poedb.method: Exact English-slug pages; localized visible title read from og:title except documented selectors.

source.selectorEvidence: active MonsterVarieties tab `.lc` whose area is `Кипящее озеро`

The Basilisk.curationReason: The page-level og:title concatenates unrelated records. The active canonical monster tab visibly names `Василиск` and identifies The Boiling Lake; display is its animate accusative.

None.grammaticalContext: characterClass sentinel displayed raw by BuildInfoForm
None.fallbackReason: Internal unset sentinel, not an official Path of Exile class name. Translate through a dedicated UI message instead of treating it as game data.

sourceFailures.resolution: Exact Russian quest page and exact singular monster page prove `легионеров-каменитов`.

ambiguousNames.issue: Page-level og:title concatenates `Василиск Каменноугольный Часовой-пандемоний` from multiple records.
ambiguousNames.resolution: Use visible active MonsterVarieties name `Василиск`; the same tab identifies area `Кипящее озеро` (The Boiling Lake).
Trim whitespace only; official wording remains `Алира Мракоглас`.

notes: Kill display values are intentionally contextual accusatives; do not replace them with nominative page titles.
Bandits and classes are standalone BuildInfoForm values and therefore remain nominative.
Unknown imported characterClass strings must retain runtime English fallback.
